description_for_human: A mobile learning app for daily coding practice with personalized problems, streak tracking, and syntax-highlighted solutions.
description_for_model: LeetCode Daily is an educational mobile app (iOS & Android) that delivers personalized daily coding challenges in 6 languages (Java, Python, C++, JavaScript, C#, Go) across 3 skill levels. Features include streak tracking, offline support, push reminders, and a Pro subscription for expanded access.
